do: Use for action/overflow menus triggered by a button; compose the full DropdownMenu* surface (Item, CheckboxItem, RadioItem, Sub, Separator, Label…).
dont: Don't use DropdownMenu to pick a form value — use select (or combobox for searchable lists).
Don't use it for right-click menus — use context-menu.

boundaries: Figma naming trap: the Figma set named "Select" on the dropdown-menu page (1292:5274) is combobox, not this component; this set is node 1049:6592.

whenToUseInstead.when: choosing a value in a form
a horizontal bar of application menus
